description: User clicks on the 'From' input field to change the departure location.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is visible with the search form in the center. The 'From' field currently shows 'Sydney (SYD)'.

description: A dropdown menu appears with location suggestions based on the current input.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: A dropdown menu has opened below the 'From' input field, showing 'Sydney (SYD)' and 'Wollongong (WOL)'.

description: User types 'su' into the 'From' input field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The text 'su' is being entered into the departure location field.

description: The location suggestions dropdown updates to show results matching 'su'.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The dropdown menu now shows suggestions like 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)', 'Surabaya (SUB)', and 'Suva (SUV)'.

description: User selects 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' from the list of suggestions.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' option in the dropdown menu.

description: The 'From' field updates to the selected location and the dropdown closes.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The 'From' field now displays 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' and the suggestion dropdown has disappeared.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'To' input field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the destination input field.

description: A testing tool prompt overlay appears on the screen.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: A dark overlay with the text 'Yes, please think aloud as you go. What are you looking at right now?' covers the page.

description: The testing tool prompt disappears, returning focus to the website.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The dark overlay has gone, and the Skyscanner search form is visible again.

description: User clicks on the 'To' input field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The user activates the destination input field.

description: A dropdown menu appears for the destination input.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: A dropdown menu showing recent or popular destinations has opened below the 'To' field.

description: User types 'ond' into the 'To' input field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The user is typing 'ond' to search for London.

description: The destination suggestions update to show results matching 'ond'.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The dropdown menu updates to show various London airports and 'London (Any)'.

description: User selects 'London (Any)' from the destination suggestions.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The cursor selects the 'London (Any)' option from the dropdown list.

description: The 'To' field updates and the dropdown closes.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The destination field now shows 'London (Any)'.

description: User hovers over the 'Search' button.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'Search' button.

description: User clicks the 'Search' button to find flights.
page_title: Skyscanner | Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The user clicks the search button to initiate the flight search.

description: The browser begins navigating to the flight search results page.
page_title: Skyscanner | Sunshine Coast (MCY) - London (Any)
frame_description: The screen goes white with a small loading spinner at the top center as the new page begins to load.

description: The search results page loads with skeleton screens and a 'Searching...' indicator.
page_title: Skyscanner | Sunshine Coast (MCY) - London (Any)
frame_description: The results page layout is visible with skeleton placeholders for flight cards and a 'Searching...' progress bar at the top.

description: User hovers over the 'Select' button of the first flight result.
page_title: Skyscanner | Sunshine Coast (MCY) - London (Any)
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Select' button for a Virgin Australia flight priced at $2,388.

description: User scrolls down the results page to view more flight options.
page_title: Skyscanner | Sunshine Coast (MCY) - London (Any)
frame_description: The page content moves upward as the user scrolls down to see more flight results.
